content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-improvement pipeline as a bootstrap to build multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms that still retain Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional training or supervision. This hybrid framework would have the LLM generate multiple divergent initial outputs, then use Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback loop to refine each perspective against the others, resolving inconsistencies to produce a higher-quality final output.
